Package com.dtwthalion.ttio

Class MiniJson

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.MiniJson
public final class MiniJson extends Object
Minimal JSON parser/encoder for the compound-metadata JSON attribute fallback path (§6 of format-spec). Handles the exact shapes emitted by the three language implementations: flat arrays of objects whose values are strings, numbers, booleans, arrays, objects, or null.

Not a general-purpose JSON library. Kept in-tree to avoid pulling Jackson/Gson into the dependency tree for one attribute parser.

Since:
0.5

    Alias of encode(java.lang.Object) with a naming convention that matches the Python json.dumps / ObjC NSJSONSerialization counterparts used by the ZarrProvider family.

  • Method Details

    • parseArrayOfObjects

      public static List<Map<String,Object>> parseArrayOfObjects(String blob)
      Parse [{...},{...}] into a list of string-keyed maps.

    • parseStringMap

      public static Map<String,String> parseStringMap(String blob)
      Parse a JSON object whose values are strings, e.g. {"key":"val"}. Non-string values are coerced via toString(). Returns an empty map on null or malformed input.

    • parseArrayOfStrings

      public static List<String> parseArrayOfStrings(String blob)
      Parse a JSON array of strings, e.g. ["a","b"].

    • encode

      public static String encode(Object v)
      Encode any parsed value back to JSON. Round-trips what parser produces.

    • serialise

      public static String serialise(Object v)
      Alias of encode(java.lang.Object) with a naming convention that matches the Python json.dumps / ObjC NSJSONSerialization counterparts used by the ZarrProvider family. @since 0.8

    • parse

      public static Object parse(String blob)
      Generic parse entry point — returns the value as a nested Map / List / Number / Boolean / String / null. Complements the type-specific parseArrayOfObjects(java.lang.String), parseStringMap(java.lang.String), and parseArrayOfStrings(java.lang.String) helpers. @since 0.8

    • quote

      public static String quote(String s)
      Quote a string as a JSON string literal (adds the quotes).

    • getString

      public static String getString(Map<String,Object> m, String key, String defaultValue)

    • getLong

      public static long getLong(Map<String,Object> m, String key, long defaultValue)

    • getDouble

      public static double getDouble(Map<String,Object> m, String key, double defaultValue)
